sessions.intent: Settle the execution-trace fork graph model and hand codeanalyzer a buildable example to render in the web UI.

before.assumptions: Prototype framed trace as overlaying two runs of one action with sequence edges and out-degree forks. Ingi corrected scope: capture ALL C# methods, accumulate over all runs, surface forks.
before.risk: Sequence-edge + out-degree model collapses once every method is woven (every node a fork, fake merges on shared utilities). Model had to change before any UI was built on it.

actions.context: Settled model: call edges (parent->child), fork = callees differ across runs via distinct-run-count (node forks iff an out-edge runCount < node runCount), forks-only v1, no run identity retained. Rejected out-degree>=2 (lights up every method) and sequence edges (fake merges). Includes capture format, build rule, worked example, UI guidance.

Fabricated 4-run capture (warm / cold+ctx / cold+noctx / warm) of Start reading %user%. Call-edge NDJSON (enter/ret with id+parent+sig). Produces exactly three forks (data.As, Wire.ReadBody, Wire.ReadSignatureLayer) as an acceptance check for the renderer.
Added a pointer at the top to the settled model so the canonical doc's superseded sequence/overlay sections don't mislead codeanalyzer.

after.notes: Handoff ready for codeanalyzer to build the web UI. Open (deferred, non-blocking): Fody vs Harmony weaving, arming model, multi-condition capture UX.
